appraisal_events.evidence: « sa joie de ne pas venir de longtemps aux Champs-Élysées »; « cette marque d’indifférence »
appraisal_events.explanation: The narrator frames Gilberte’s cheerful declaration that she will not come for a long time as a clear sign of indifference, locally casting her in an unkind, distancing light.

status_effects.explanation: She is locally diminished because her delighted refusal to return is presented as an explicit mark of indifference.
